name: PhonePe PURPLE Credit Card

milestones.label: Yatra voucher worth ₹3,000 on annual spends of ₹3 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Yatra voucher worth ₹3,000 on annual spends of ₹3 lakh
joiningBenefits: PhonePe e-Gift Card worth ₹500 after payment of annual fee, unless the card is issued under a first-year-free offer

joiningBenefitsValued.label: PhonePe e-Gift Card worth ₹500 after payment of annual fee, unless the card is issued under a first-year-free offer

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends
Available on RuPay and Visa networks

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

additionalDetails: Accelerated RPs on PhonePe spends (3 RP / 100) is applicable only on select categories - Recharges, Utilities, Bill Payments, Insurance and Travel.
internalNotes: Audited against official PhonePe SBI Card PURPLE product page, reward program T&C, welcome benefit T&C, milestone T&C, reward redemption FAQ, and customer notices page on 2026-06-08.
Accelerated Reward Points on PhonePe spends apply only to select categories such as recharges, utilities, bill payments, insurance, and travel.
Utilities and insurance spends outside PhonePe accrue only base Reward Points, with the official reward program T&C calling out a max 250 Reward Points per calendar month for those spends.
All Scan & Pay transactions made using PhonePe SBI Card PURPLE accrue 1% value back.
PhonePe SBI Card PURPLE is exempt from the 1 Apr 2026 statement credit redemption revision that moved most SBI cards to 4,000-point multiples and imposed a 60,000-point monthly cap.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-25.
